- [ ] Skill update

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped to the stated intent (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] `README.md` reflects user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] `skills/README.md` reflects skill/config changes
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` reflects convention changes
- [ ] Optional behaviors are controlled via `skills/config.yaml`
- [ ] If PROVENANCE behavior is enabled by default, requirements remain consistent across docs
- [ ] If PROVENANCE behavior defaults changed, rationale is documented in this PR
